modules.legal_aid: General legal-access and rights workflow outside bail/surety and civic certificate preparation.
modules.zamanatai: Arrest-to-bail, bail application, surety, bond and bail-property workflow.
modules.civicdocs: OCR-assisted public-service and legal-aid application preparation workflow.

bail_enquiry.definition: Bail eligibility, custody threshold or bail application request.

surety_bond.definition: Surety, bond, muchchalka or bail property-document request.

case_status.definition: Case, FIR, charge-sheet or hearing status request.

legal_rights.definition: Arrest, lawyer, production, legal aid or general accused-rights request.

labour_dispute.definition: Unpaid wages, termination, contractor or workplace-rights request.

tenant_housing.definition: Rent, eviction, deposit or landlord dispute.

cyber_fraud.definition: UPI, OTP, online scam or digital financial fraud.

consumer_complaint.definition: Defective product, warranty, refund or consumer grievance.

domestic_violence.definition: Domestic abuse, protection, residence, maintenance or immediate safety request.

rti_request.definition: Request for public records or RTI drafting/appeal guidance.

zero_fir.definition: Police refusal, jurisdiction refusal, Zero FIR or escalation request.

income_certificate.definition: Income-certificate application preparation and evidence validation.

caste_certificate.definition: Caste/category certificate application preparation and lineage evidence validation.

domicile_certificate.definition: Domicile/residence application preparation and residence evidence validation.

disability_pension.definition: Disability pension/benefit application and medical/banking evidence validation.

legal_aid_application.definition: Formal application preparation for District/State Legal Services Authority.

urgency.medium: Time-sensitive workflow or material loss without immediate danger.
urgency.high: Custody, imminent deadline, serious refusal, benefit interruption or escalating risk.
urgency.emergency: Immediate safety, child, violence, medical or active financial-loss risk.
